title: Respiratory Therapist
description: Memorial Sloan Kettering is seeking a Respiratory Therapist to support cancer patient care and treatment. Work fully remote providing respiratory support for patients undergoing cancer therapies. Help improve outcomes for cancer patients nationwide.
responsibilities: Provide respiratory care and oxygen therapy to cancer patients
Monitor patient respiratory status and vital signs
Assist with intubation and extubation procedures
Document patient assessments and care provided
Collaborate with oncology teams on patient care coordination

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Respiratory Therapy from accredited program
skills: Attention to detail and safety awareness
Ability to work in high-stress environments
certifications: ACLS (Advanced Cardiac Life Support) certification required

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
